sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95409" key="skwlhkofa/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκωληκο-φάγος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n95409.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating worms</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">grubs</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg014:592b:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">592b16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
